label: HIL Synthesize
description: Generate AXI-Lite wrapper for Amaranth module and build PYNQ overlay via Vivado. Requires Vivado running with socket server.

parameters.label: Code
parameters.default:
import sys, os
os.chdir('D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas')
sys.path.insert(0, 'D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas/hil/scripts')
from axi_wrapper import generate_hil_design
from vivado_build import build_hil_overlay

io_mode = '${io_mode}'

# Step 1: Generate Verilog + AXI wrapper
print('=== Step 1: Generating HIL design files ===')
hil_design = generate_hil_design(
    ${module_var},
    output_dir='D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas/${build_dir}/${project_name}',
    io_mode=io_mode
)

# Step 2: Build overlay via Vivado
print('\n=== Step 2: Building PYNQ overlay via Vivado ===')
print('(This may take 15-30 minutes for first build, cached afterwards)')
${result_var} = build_hil_overlay(
    verilog_dir='D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas/${build_dir}/${project_name}',
    board_type=${config_var}.config.board_type,
    project_name='${project_name}'
)

if ${result_var}.get('cached'):
    print('\nUsed cached bitstream (no rebuild needed)')
else:
    print('\nBuild completed successfully')

print(f'Bitstream: {${result_var}["bit_path"]}')
print(f'Design hash: {${result_var}["design_hash"]}')
